title: OpampExtension
description: Category extension for operational amplifiers (general-purpose, precision, rail-to-rail I/O, rail-to-rail output, JFET-input, CMOS-input, chopper, instrumentation, comparator). Layered on top of base per spec §7. Version 1.0. Field union from LM358 (Fairchild → ON Semi BJT general-purpose dual single-supply, SOIC-8/PDIP-8) + MCP6004 (Microchip CMOS rail-to-rail I/O quad, SOIC-14/PDIP-14/TSSOP-14). v1.4 omits noise_voltage_density / noise_current_density / phase_margin — deferred to v1.5 to avoid spec_value unit enum sprawl (V/√Hz, A/√Hz, degrees).

opamp_topology.description: Op-amp functional category. Choose the single closest match. LM358 → general_purpose. MCP6004 → rail_to_rail_io (preferred over cmos_input when both apply — rail_to_rail_io is more specific).

channels.description: Number of independent op-amp channels in the package. Single=1, dual=2, quad=4.

vsupply_range.description: Total supply voltage range V+ to V− (unit: V). For single-supply parts store as min/max of VDD−VSS. For split-supply parts store as the single-supply equivalent (e.g. ±16V → max=32V) with a condition note, or provide two SpecValues for each mode.

vsupply_split_capable.description: True when the part is specified for split (bipolar) supply operation. False when single-supply only. Null when not determinable from the datasheet.

iq_per_amp.description: Quiescent current PER op-amp channel (unit: A). NOT total package current. Divide datasheet's total ICC by channels when only total is published. Condition carries VS and load conditions.

gbw.description: Gain-bandwidth product (unit: Hz — NOT MHz; store 1MHz as 1e6). The frequency at which open-loop gain crosses 0dB (unity gain). Condition carries supply voltage and load.

slew_rate.description: Slew rate (unit: V/s — NOT V/µs; store 0.6V/µs as 6e5). Rate of output voltage change under large-signal step conditions. Condition carries supply voltage and load.

vos.description: Input offset voltage (unit: V). Condition carries Vcm and supply. Multiple SpecValues for different temperature conditions.

ib.description: Input bias current (unit: A). BJT inputs are typically nA (e.g. 45nA → 4.5e-8); CMOS/JFET inputs are typically pA (e.g. 1pA → 1e-12). Condition carries temperature.

cmrr.description: Common mode rejection ratio (unit: dB). Condition carries common mode input range and supply. Higher is better.

psrr.description: Power supply rejection ratio (unit: dB). Condition carries supply range. Higher is better.

vout_swing_high.description: Output high swing headroom (unit: V — stored as positive headroom FROM V+). Rail-to-rail parts have ~25mV headroom; general-purpose parts may have 1.5–2V headroom. Condition carries supply voltage and load current.

vout_swing_low.description: Output low swing headroom (unit: V — stored as positive headroom FROM V−). Rail-to-rail parts swing to within ~25mV of V−; general-purpose parts have ~5–20mV headroom at light load. Condition carries supply voltage and load.

output_drive_current.description: Output source or sink current capability (unit: A). May be specified as short-circuit current (ISC) or as current at a given output voltage. Multiple SpecValues for source vs sink or different supply voltages.

unity_gain_stable.description: True when the part is specified as stable at unity gain (AV=1). False when minimum gain is greater than 1. Null when not stated. Most general-purpose op-amps are unity-gain stable.

shutdown_pin.description: Shutdown/enable pin number string (matches base.pinout[*].numbers), or null when the part has no shutdown pin. Most op-amps lack a shutdown pin (null). Shutdownable parts include OPA376, MCP6N11, etc.

thermal_resistance.description: Thermal resistance characteristics. Through-hole packages typically have only rtheta_ja; SMD packages may add rtheta_jc.

rtheta_ja.description: Junction-to-ambient thermal resistance (K/W or °C/W). Condition may specify board and copper area conditions.

rtheta_jc.description: Junction-to-case thermal resistance (K/W or °C/W). Null when not specified.

rtheta_jl.description: Junction-to-lead thermal resistance (K/W or °C/W). Common for some SMD packages. Null for most op-amp packages.

package.description: Package physical characteristics. body_mm uses nested object shape (Phase 3b option A convention — inner keys align with base.schema.json body_mm shape).

pin_count.description: Number of leads/pins. Typically 5, 8, or 14 for op-amps.

pitch_mm.description: Lead pitch in millimeters. Null when not applicable.

body_mm.description: Package body dimensions in millimeters. Nested object per Phase 3b option A convention. Inner keys (length/width/height) align with base.schema.json's body_mm shape.

length.description: Body length in millimeters along the longest axis.

width.description: Body width in millimeters along the perpendicular-to-length axis.

height.description: Body height in millimeters (package thickness / standoff direction).

thermal_pad.description: True when the package has an exposed thermal pad on the bottom. Null when not determinable.
